definition: 1 if opening_theaters <= 100 and max_theaters >= 500; platform-style scarcity followed by reach.
1 if opening_theaters <= 100; initial access scarcity regardless of later expansion.
opening_theaters / max_theaters; lower values imply stronger platform rollout.
max_theaters / opening_theaters; higher values imply stronger expansion after initial scarcity.
log(1 + theater_expansion_ratio), used to reduce skew.
domestic_box_office_usd / opening_weekend_usd; sustained demand after opening weekend.
worldwide ROI clipped at the 99th percentile for regression stability.
1 if IMDb rating >= 7.0; missing IMDb ratings remain missing.
Fixed-effect categories with rare categories collapsed into Other.
